_promotion_threshold: 3-strike (current N=2 on AKID-fixture-trip; standard cadence; NOT secrets-class exemption)

production.description: Load-bearing user-facing content, AaaS artifacts, doctrine published to clients, worker output landing in canonical paths

protection.description: Detector/hook/gate code itself; the mechanism that protects production

test-fixture.description: Synthetic content exercising protection code; must match the SHAPE of real secrets to test detectors, but contains canonical-fake markers

self-documentation.description: Doctrine documenting protection mechanisms; describes patterns it does not embody

audit-ledger.description: Receipts of protection firing, dispatch logs, fuckup logs, leak ledgers — append-only stocks

synthetic_sentinels._marker_substring_policy: If the matched secret value contains any of these substrings, treat as synthetic regardless of path

_paradigm_notes: Meadows L2 paradigm primitive: every artifact has a substrate_class.
Protection mechanisms (hooks, gates, detectors) MUST consult this manifest before halting on a shape-match.
Self-referential substrate (this manifest, protection paths, audit ledgers) is self-exempt by design — the system can now see itself.
This manifest itself has substrate_class=protection and is path-listed in protection_paths above (recursion terminator by paradigm design).
Donella mirror-stage check: every new mechanism must declare substrate_class at creation, not retrofit later.
N=3 SATURATION propagator gate + L160 AKID fixture trip + cobbler's-children dirty-tree all dissolve once substrate_class is paradigm-primary.
